title: limonium atticum
intro: Limonium atticum, also known as sea lavender, is a Mediterranean shrub that produces small, fragrant flowers in shades of purple and pink. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Limonium atticum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Limonium atticum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make perfumes, skincare products, and aromatherapy blends.
